title: NOC 45100 – Student Monitors, Crossing Guards and Related Occupations | GTR Immigration
description: Student Monitors, Crossing Guards, and Related Occupations under NOC 45100 play an important role in maintaining safety and order within school environments and surrounding community areas. Classified under TEER 5, this occupation typically requires short-term work demonstration and minimal formal education. These professionals are commonly employed by:

classification.teer: Classification LevelDetailsBroad Occupation Category4 – Occupations in education, law, and social, community, and government servicesTEER5 – Occupations usually require short-term work demonstration and no formal educationMajor Group45 – Student monitors, crossing guards and related occupationsSub-Major Group451 – Student monitors, crossing guards and related occupationsMinor Group4510 – Student monitors, crossing guards and related occupationsNOC Code45100

duties: Monitor school buildings and grounds to ensure student safety
Oversee students during recess or noon hour
Record and report student absences, accidents, or behavioral issues
Monitor security cameras and report incidents
Supervise tests, detention sessions, or special activities
Assist in preparing classroom equipment for events
Direct and assist students at designated school crossings
Ensure safe traffic flow during school hours
employment_requirements: Completion of secondary school may be required
First aid and CPR certification may be required
Short-term on-the-job training is typically provided
Background checks are often required for positions involving children.
salary_prospects: Student Monitors and Crossing Guards typically earn:
$27,900 – $51,800 per year,depending on hours worked, province, and level of responsibility.
With 45,900 projected job openings, NOC 45100 shows strong replacement demand, particularly for part-time and school-based positions.

NOC 45100 is classified under TEER 5, which may have limited eligibility under certain federal skilled immigration programs. Applicants should carefully assess eligibility requirements before applying.

labour_market_demand: Expansion of municipal crossing safety programs
Replacement of part-time and seasonal staff
These roles are critical in ensuring student safety and school supervision.
